title: senecio matatini subsp. discoideus
intro: Senecio matatini subsp. discoideus is a subspecies of the Senecio matatini plant, a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Senecio matatini subsp. discoideus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
